papers.title: A Workflow-Aware Serving Layer for Agentic Applications
papers.abstract: Agentic AI applications form an emerging serving workload in which a request creates a workflow: a directed acyclic graph of LLM and tool calls that exposes per-node model choices and optional quality operators such as verifiers. This workload falls between two existing layers. Model-serving engines execute individual calls efficiently but cannot see workflow structure, while agent frameworks fix the workflow but cannot see backend load, so neither jointly chooses each node's model, verifier, and backend under serving-time conditions. We present Dyserve, a workflow-aware serving layer that fills this gap. Dyserve compiles each workflow's per-node model and verifier choices in one integer linear program (ILP) over a heterogeneous backend pool, priced by skill-conditioned offline profiles that transfer across workflows. This couples with hardware entering only through per-model throughput sweeps, and is weighted to concentrate strong models and verification on the nodes whose errors propagate the furthest. Because no single latency-quality preference fits every workload mix, Dyserve pre-solves the program at several pressure levels at admission and shifts a workflow's uncommitted suffix among these strategies under load, keeping the solver off the load-shift path; a failed tool call triggers a one-time residual re-solve that preserves committed work.

papers.title_zh: 面向智能体应用的工作流感知服务层
papers.summary_cn: 论文提出 Dyserve，一种工作流感知的服务层，填补了模型推理引擎与智能体框架之间的空白。Dyserve 将智能体应用的 DAG 工作流中每个节点的模型和验证器选择编译为整数线性规划（ILP），在异构后端池上进行全局优化调度，并根据错误传播距离分配更强模型和验证资源。系统在准入时预求解多压力等级策略，负载变化时在工作流未提交后缀间切换以避免求解器延迟。
innovations: 提出工作流感知服务层概念，将智能体应用的 DAG 工作流结构与后端负载联合优化，填补了模型引擎与智能体框架之间的空白
将每节点模型和验证器选择建模为 ILP，结合基于技能的离线性能画像实现跨工作流传导，硬件依赖仅通过每模型吞吐扫描体现
准入时预求解多压力等级策略，负载变化时在工作流未提交后缀间切换，使求解器脱离负载响应路径；失败工具调用触发一次性残差重求解，保留已提交工作
papers.scenario_cn: 解决智能体应用中模型服务引擎无法感知工作流结构、智能体框架无法感知后端负载的双重割裂问题，适用于多模型异构集群上的智能体推理服务场景，特别适合需要动态平衡推理延迟与输出质量的工作负载混合环境
papers.title_en: A Workflow-Aware Serving Layer for Agentic Applications

papers.title: No Time Like the Present: Agentic Test-Time Training for LLM Agents
papers.abstract: LLM agents often degrade over long episodes: as trajectories grow, they revisit explored states, repeat failed actions, and lose strategies that previously worked. Test-time training (TTT) offers a way to adapt model weights to the evolving task state, but existing LLM TTT methods largely adapt once to a fixed input. We study continuous TTT in multi-turn agent episodes, where each update changes the policy that generates later training text. This creates a self-training loop that helps when new trajectory information appears, but can amplify drift when the agent gets stuck and repeatedly trains on similar text. We find that update-text repetition distinguishes these regimes and introduce Agentic Test-Time Training (aTTT), a token-level reweighting method that downweights the loss on tokens appearing in repeated $n$-grams from prior updates while leaving novel tokens fully weighted. To run such updates inside live episodes, we build a concurrent serving system using vLLM's runtime LoRA API, limiting overhead to 1.9$\times$ the no-TTT cost. aTTT improves success by up to 5.0 points on ALFWorld and 4.9 points on SWE-bench Lite. The gains concentrate where models already have task competence but drift over long trajectories, suggesting that aTTT mainly preserves existing competence rather than teaching new abilities.

papers.title_zh: 当下即最佳时机：面向 LLM 智能体的在线测试时训练
papers.summary_cn: 论文研究多轮智能体对话中的连续测试时训练（TTT）问题，发现更新文本重复是区分有效适应与策略漂移的关键因素。提出 Agentic Test-Time Training (aTTT)，一种基于 token 级别重加权的方法，降低来自先前更新中重复 n-gram 的 token 损失权重，同时保留新 token 的完整权重。基于 vLLM 的运行时 LoRA API 构建并发服务系统，将开销控制在无 TTT 成本的 1.9 倍以内。
innovations: 首次系统研究多轮智能体场景中的连续测试时训练，识别出更新文本重复是区分有效在线适应与灾难性漂移的关键判据
提出 aTTT 方法，通过 token 级重加权机制抑制重复 n-gram 的损失信号，在不影响新知识学习的同时防止策略自训练循环中的漂移放大
基于 vLLM 运行时 LoRA API 构建并发服务系统，实现低开销的在线 TTT 更新，在 ALFWorld 和 SWE-bench Lite 上分别提升最高 5.0 和 4.9 个点
papers.scenario_cn: 解决 LLM 智能体在长轨迹任务（多轮交互）中策略退化问题——模型重复访问已探索状态、反复执行失败动作、丢失早期有效策略。适用于需要长时间多步交互的智能体任务（如具身推理、代码仓库级 SWE 修复），特别是模型已具备任务能力但在长轨迹中发生策略漂移的场景
papers.title_en: No Time Like the Present: Agentic Test-Time Training for LLM Agents

papers.title: STAC: Selective Spatiotemporal Aggregation and Compression for Video Reasoning Segmentation
papers.abstract: Video reasoning segmentation demands pixel-accurate object tracking across hundreds of frames under complex natural language queries, producing dense spatiotemporal tokens whose quadratic self-attention cost makes long-video processing prohibitive. Existing methods address this through token compression, yet typically operate on encoder features lacking temporal context, constraining selection before content redundancy can be reliably assessed. Informed compression requires contextual awareness, but acquiring that awareness at full resolution incurs the same quadratic cost compression aims to reduce. State-space models resolve this constraint, as their linear recurrence selectively conditions each token on temporal context at $\mathcal{O}(T)$ cost, producing representations where content redundancy becomes assessable. Building on this, Selective SpatioTemporal Aggregation and Compression (STAC) enriches features via decoupled bidirectional spatial and causal temporal scanning, leveraging recurrence-derived redundancy for hierarchical compression with adaptive thresholds optimised with segmentation objective. STAC achieves 85% token reduction and 1.8$\times$ speedup while surpassing compression-free baselines on reasoning segmentation benchmarks in a zero-shot streaming-compatible setting. Code is available \href{https://github.com/MCG-NKU/nku-video}{here}.

papers.title: OpenGlass: A Sensing-Computing Split Architecture for Local MLLM-Driven Real-Time Visual Assistance
papers.abstract: We present OpenGlass, an open-source, privacy-oriented, local-first system for low-latency multimodal visual assistance, with a primary focus on blind and low-vision users. Cloud MLLM assistants offer strong visual understanding, but often require uploading first-person visual data and can suffer multi-second network delays; wearable glasses are ideal for sensing, but cannot host large models under tight compute and power budgets. OpenGlass addresses this gap with a sensing-computing split: an ESP32-based glasses-side unit captures visual context, while a nearby consumer-grade device performs local MLLM inference and local speech output, reducing cloud reliance and keeping raw egocentric visual data on user-controlled devices by default. We evaluate response quality, query-ready-to-audio latency, safety-aware abstention, and auditable logs. Under real ESP32 Wi-Fi capture, OpenGlass reaches 993 ms median user-to-audio latency with resized payloads and 1625 ms with raw 1280 x 720 payloads; 97.5% and 93.3% of trials fall below 2 s, respectively. OpenGlass is a user-initiated visual-assistance reference platform for obstacle/hazard awareness, sign/object queries, and image-quality self-checking, rather than a certified navigation aid. We release source code, hardware instructions, prompts, evaluation data, and logs.

papers.title: PraMem: Practice-derived Experiential Memory for Long-horizon Behavior Prediction
papers.abstract: Long-horizon behavior prediction aims to infer a user's next action based on a lengthy historical sequence, playing a crucial role in artificial intelligence field. The rise of large language models (LLMs) offers a promising direction for sequential behavior prediction, yet LLMs struggle with latent behavioral pattern induction and model-intrinsic cognitive biases when tackling long-horizon behavior prediction. Prior memory management methods follow a context-compression paradigm that attempts to address this task by alleviating the historical sequence burden, yet fail to resolve the core challenges. In this paper, we advocate a paradigm shift that reframes the lengthy historical sequence from a burden into a valuable resource to be exploited, and accordingly propose PraMem, which conducts beforehand practice over the lengthy historical sequence to build an experiential memory, thereby serving as the assisted input for accurate long-horizon behavior prediction. Extensive experiments across diverse tasks demonstrate that PraMem achieves superior performance than prior methods, and more in-depth analyses provide valuable insights into the mechanism and evolution of the experiential memory. Code: https://github.com/icip-cas/PraMem.

papers.title: SAF3R: Dynamic Sparse Attention for Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction Transformers
papers.abstract: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction (F3R) transformers have recently achieved remarkable success. However, scaling them to long image sequences remains challenging, as the quadratic complexity of cross-view global attention quickly becomes the dominant computational bottleneck. While recent efforts attempt to improve efficiency through compressed or sparse attention, they fail to fully exploit the inherent sparsity and dynamic behavior of global attention. In this work, we present a comprehensive analysis of global attention across multiple F3R transformers and reveal that attention patterns are highly heterogeneous, dynamic, and extremely sparse across layers and attention heads. Motivated by these findings, we propose SAF3R, a training-free dynamic sparse attention framework tailored to F3R transformers. SAF3R integrates tailored sparse attention mechanisms with offline head profiling and an efficient online adaptation strategy to match input-dependent attention behaviors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SAF3R achieves high sparsity ratios while preserving camera pose estimation and 3D reconstruction quality, translating into substantial end-to-end speedup on F3R transformers compared to existing methods. Code is available at https://github.com/jndeng/SAF3R

papers.title_zh: SAF3R：面向前馈3D重建Transformer的动态稀疏注意力框架
papers.summary_cn: 前馈3D重建Transformer（F3R）在长图像序列上扩展时面临跨视角全局注意力的二次复杂度瓶颈。本文对多个F3R Transformer的全局注意力模式进行了全面分析，发现注意力在层间和头间呈现高度异质、动态且极度稀疏的特性。基于此观察，提出SAF3R——一个无需训练的动态稀疏注意力框架，结合离线头部画像与高效在线自适应策略，按输入动态匹配注意力行为。实验表明，SAF3R在保持相机位姿估计和3D重建质量的同时实现高稀疏率，并带来显著的端到端加速效果。
innovations: 1. 首次对多个F3R Transformer的全局注意力进行系统分析，揭示其高度异质、动态和极度稀疏的特性；2. 提出SAF3R框架，结合离线注意力头画像（识别每个头在不同数据上的稀疏模式偏好）与轻量在线自适应策略，无需微调即可按输入动态选择保留的注意力位置；3. 在保持重建质量的前提下实现高稀疏率，显著降低跨视角注意力计算开销并带来实际端到端加速。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要处理长图像序列的3D重建场景，如多视图三维重建、大规模场景重建、视频级3D重建等，特别适合对实时性或计算资源敏感的实际部署环境。其动态稀疏注意力的分析方法和设计思路也可迁移至其他Transformer模型（包括LLM）的注意力加速优化。
papers.title_en: SAF3R: Dynamic Sparse Attention for Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction Transformers

papers.title: IDEAL-Bench: Indoor Dataset and Evaluation suite for Analyzing 3D Layout reasoning
papers.abstract: Spatial question answering is the dominant paradigm for evaluating spatial intelligence in Vision-Language Models (VLMs), but it leaves a complementary axis of spatial competence under-evaluated: holistic 3D layout inference, which predicts every visible object's pose and extent from a single image in a structured form. To this end, we introduce IDEAL-Bench, an evaluation suite that requires VLMs to predict structured 3D layouts on photorealistic indoor scenes across 10 room types, scored along five numerical dimensions and a perceptual render-and-compare protocol. By operating on semantically realistic scenes with full asset substitution under controlled lighting and viewpoint, IDEAL-Bench moves beyond CLEVR-style simple geometric primitives so that any image-space discrepancy reflects spatial reasoning alone. The benchmark is built on IDEAL-Scenes, a procedurally generated dataset of 1,000 re-renderable Blender environments with ground-truth layouts. Evaluating 15 prominent VLMs reveals three findings: the task remains substantially unsolved, with the strongest model reaching only 62.1/100 overall; all models exhibit a sharp asymmetry between object recognition and geometric regression, indicating that current VLMs are trained to describe scenes rather than to measure them; model rankings partially diverge from those on QA-based and primitive-reconstruction benchmarks: top-tier consensus holds, but mid-tier rankings shift substantially. Collectively, these findings establish IDEAL-Bench as a diagnostic suite, targeting the geometric and structural competencies that QA-based evaluation cannot surface, and paving the way towards more rigorous evaluation of spatial intelligence in next-generation VLMs. Together, these findings position IDEAL-Bench as a principled diagnostic for whether future VLMs achieve genuine spatial understanding rather than linguistic approximations of it.

papers.title_zh: IDEAL-Bench：面向3D布局推理分析的室内数据集与评估套件
papers.summary_cn: 提出 IDEAL-Bench，一个用于评估视觉语言模型（VLM）三维布局推理能力的基准。现有空间问答（Spatial QA）范式难以评估模型对场景中所有可见物体位姿与尺寸的联合推断能力。IDEAL-Bench 要求 VLM 从单张图像预测结构化的 3D 布局，覆盖 10 种室内场景类型，通过五个数值维度与可渲染比较协议打分。基于 IDEAL-Scenes（1,000 个可重渲染 Blender 环境）构建，采用真实感场景与可控光照/视角，避免了 CLEVR 风格简单几何体的局限。评测 15 个主流 VLM 发现：该任务远未解决（最佳模型仅 62.1/100）；所有模型在物体识别与几何回归之间存在严重不对称——当前 VLM 更擅长描述场景而非测量场景；模型排名与基于 QA 和基元重建的基准存在部分分歧。
innovations: 提出 IDEAL-Bench，首个聚焦完整 3D 布局推理（预测每个可见物体的位姿与范围）而非仅空间问答的 VLM 评测协议
构建 IDEAL-Scenes，含 1,000 个程序化生成、可重渲染 Blender 室内场景，提供真值布局
提出感知级渲染-比较（render-and-compare）评估协议，配合五个数值维度实现多维度空间推理打分
采用真实感场景与完整资产替换，将图像空间差异仅归因于空间推理能力，突破了 CLEVR 风格简单几何体的局限
揭示 VLM 在 3D 布局推理上的严重缺陷：物体识别与几何回归能力间存在显著不对称，且模型排名与传统 QA 基准发生实质性偏移
papers.scenario_cn: 用于严格诊断下一代 VLM 是否具备真实的空间理解能力（而非语言层面的近似描述），特别适用于室内场景理解、机器人导航、AR/VR 空间感知等需要精确 3D 几何推理的应用场景
papers.title_en: IDEAL-Bench: Indoor Dataset and Evaluation suite for Analyzing 3D Layout reasoning

papers.title: Overloading Large Vision-Language Models for Jailbreaking
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) exhibit remarkable vision-language capabilities and are increasingly deployed in real-world applications such as personal assistants, document analysis systems, and embodied agents. However, their dual-modal attack surfaces make them vulnerable to jailbreak attacks. Existing LVLM jailbreaks rely on simple designs, e.g., short text and out-of-distribution images. Nevertheless, recent advancements in both large language model backbones and multimodal mechanisms undermine these attacks, particularly their transferability among model architectures. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel information overloading method that is equipped with both extensive text and multi-dimensional image attacks. These components are arranged in recursion-based image-typography layouts to exponentially increase multimodal information complexity. This overloading approach amplifies the cross-modal processing required, which undermines the safety alignment in LVLMs. Extensive experiments on both open-sourced and commercial LVLMs establish our method as a new state-of-the-art LVLM jailbreak attack. On open-source models, our method achieves an average ASR of 88.6%; on commercial LVLMs, it reaches an average ASR of 84.0%, exceeding the best baseline by 48.7%. Moreover, our prompts optimized on open-source surrogate models transfer effectively across model families. Beyond empirical results, we probe the safety-critical information flows within victim LVLMs. Our observations reveal that complex image-typography compositions induce intensified cross-modal processing and reduce the model's certainty in generating refusal responses. Together, these findings highlight information overloading as a practical and emerging safety risk for real-world LVLM deployments, underscoring the need for stronger defenses against complex multimodal jailbreak inputs.

papers.title: BVS: Bayesian Visual Search with Multimodal Large Language Model for Fine-grained Perception
papers.abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate impressive general capabilities, they struggle with fine-grained perception in ultra-high-resolution (UHR) images, particularly for tiny objects in cluttered scenes. Existing methods face a dilemma: they either rely on inefficient prior-free scanning, or depend on static prior-driven heuristics that lack posterior correction to rectify initial model biases. To address this, we propose BVS (Bayesian Visual Search), a framework that formulates perception as a global optimization problem over a continuous spatial-scale manifold. Specifically, BVS bridges prior guidance with posterior correction: it utilizes an early-stop attention rollout of MLLM to construct reasoning-aware priors, while employing a scale-aware non-stationary kernel and GP-UCB to dynamically rectify noise and recover missing information in the prior through iterative local observations. We provide theoretical guarantees via sub-linear regret bounds, and extensive experiments demonstrate that BVS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with a superior trade-off between accuracy and efficiency.

papers.title_zh: BVS：基于贝叶斯视觉搜索的多模态大语言模型细粒度感知框架
papers.summary_cn: 本文提出 BVS（贝叶斯视觉搜索）框架，将超高清图像中的细粒度感知建模为连续空间-尺度流形上的全局优化问题。核心思路是结合先验引导与后验校正：利用多模态大模型的早期停止注意力图构建推理感知先验，再通过尺度感知非平稳核与 GP-UCB 策略，在迭代局部观测中动态校正噪声并恢复先验遗漏信息。理论层面给出了次线性遗憾界保证，实验表明 BVS 在精度与效率的权衡上显著优于现有基线方法。
innovations: 将细粒度感知重新定义为连续空间-尺度流形上的全局优化问题，而非传统先验无关扫描或静态先验驱动方法
提出早停注意力展开机制，利用 MLLM 内部注意力图构建推理感知先验，无需额外标注
引入尺度感知非平稳核与 GP-UCB 贝叶斯优化策略，实现先验后验的动态校正闭环
给出次线性遗憾界的理论保证，融合了理论严谨性与实际有效性
papers.scenario_cn: 解决 MLLM 在高分辨率、杂乱场景下对小目标细粒度感知困难的问题，适用于超高分辨率图像中的目标检测、定位与细粒度识别场景
papers.title_en: BVS: Bayesian Visual Search with Multimodal Large Language Model for Fine-grained Perception

papers.title: Best-of-Better-$N$: Generating Pre-Aligned Responses with In-Context Learning
papers.abstract: Inference-time alignment methods, such as Best-of-$N$, offer a flexible alternative to training-based alignment by using reward models to select high-quality responses generated by a reference LLM. However, the efficacy of these methods is inherently limited by the response quality: if the reference LLM assigns negligible probability to high-reward responses, no selection strategy will succeed in finding aligned outputs. In this work, we propose Best-of-Better-$N$ (BoBN), an in context learning-based generation framework to address this challenge. Our method utilizes retrieval from high-reward examples relevant to the input query and task. Crucially, we introduce a restyling step where retrieved responses are rewritten by the reference LLM to align with the target task's format and style. These restyled examples are used in-context to shift the sampling distribution toward the high-reward region. We analytically characterize how in-context learning shifts the output distribution of pretrained transformers toward the high-reward region, resulting in provable benefits on the target task. We then evaluate BoBN on safety alignment and mathematical reasoning benchmarks across several reference LLMs. BoBN's higher-quality responses enable better performance to be achieved when the number of responses $N$ is fixed, and smaller $N$ required to achieve a target performance.

papers.title_zh: Better-N 择优：通过上下文学习生成预对齐响应
papers.summary_cn: 本文提出 Best-of-Better-N（BoBN）框架，解决推理时对齐方法（如 Best-of-N）受限于参考 LLM 生成质量的根本瓶颈。核心思路是通过检索与输入查询相关的高奖励示例，并由参考 LLM 对这些示例进行格式与风格改写（restyling），再以 in-context learning 方式引导模型采样分布向高奖励区域迁移。理论分析证明该分布偏移在预训练 Transformer 上可被严格刻画，实验在安全对齐与数学推理任务上验证了固定 N 下性能提升、以及达到目标性能所需 N 减少的效果。
innovations: 提出 restyling 步骤：将检索到的高奖励响应由参考 LLM 改写为目标任务的格式与风格，弥补原始检索样例与目标任务间的分布差异
从理论上证明了 in-context learning 如何将预训练 Transformer 的输出分布向高奖励区域偏移，给出可量化的性能增益保证
BoBN 在固定采样数 N 下输出更高质量响应，或在更低 N 下达到同等对齐效果，兼顾推理成本与对齐质量
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于对 LLM 输出有高对齐要求的场景（安全对齐、数学推理），特别是当参考模型本身难以直接生成高奖励响应时；可作为训练式对齐（RLHF/DPO）的低成本替代或在推理阶段叠加使用
papers.title_en: Best-of-Better-$N$: Generating Pre-Aligned Responses with In-Context Learning

papers.title: Reading Between the Dots: Decoding Hidden Computation across Filler Tokens
papers.abstract: Frontier LLMs can perform multi-step reasoning over content-free filler tokens like dots or counting sequences, producing correct answers with no visible chain-of-thought (CoT). This is a limit case for behavioral oversight, where surface tokens carry no information about the underlying reasoning. But hidden from the output is not the same as hidden from us. On four task families (fact retrieval, parallel numeric composition, string manipulation, and in-context computation), two open-weights frontier models (DeepSeek V3, Kimi K2) compute over filler tokens in a structured, legible way: attention routes the question through the filler region to the answer, logit-lens readouts show retrieved facts emerging early and their composition crystallizing in late layers, and KV-cache transplants at filler positions causally swap outputs between examples. We introduce an unsupervised decoding pipeline that takes only hidden states as input and recovers intermediate values with 80-95% accuracy (best LLM judge) across both models and all four tasks, without ground-truth labels or training. Hidden computation that defeats behavioral CoT monitoring is, on these tasks, directly readable from the residual stream, suggesting monitorability is a property of the model's full computational trace, not just its surface tokens.

papers.title_zh: 在点阵间阅读：解码填充 Token 中的隐藏计算
papers.summary_cn: 本文发现前沿 LLM（DeepSeek V3、Kimi K2）可以在无明显思维链（CoT）的情况下，仅通过填充 Token（如点号或计数序列）完成多步推理任务。作者在四个任务族（事实检索、并行数值组合、字符串操作、上下文计算）上系统分析了隐藏计算过程：注意力机制将问题路由经过填充区域再到答案，logit lens 显示早期层已召回事实、后期层合成结果，KV-cache 移植实验可跨示例因果地交换输出。进一步提出一种无监督解码流水线，仅使用隐藏状态即可恢复中间值，准确率 80-95%。
innovations: 首次系统揭示和量化了 LLM 在无表面 CoT 的填充 Token 上进行结构化隐藏计算的能力与机制
提出无监督解码流水线，仅依赖残差流隐藏状态即可高精度恢复中间推理值，无需标注数据或训练
通过 KV-cache 移植实验因果证明填充位置确实承载了实质性计算，而非随机噪声
papers.scenario_cn: 对 LLM 安全监控与可解释性有重要意义——表明模型的全计算轨迹（包括隐藏状态）比表面 Token 更值得监控；适用于需要检测模型是否在无表面推理痕迹的情况下执行潜在危险推理的场景
papers.title_en: Reading Between the Dots: Decoding Hidden Computation across Filler Tokens

papers.title: HyperParallel-Mpipe: A Composable Algebra System for Optimizing MLLM Training over Supernode Clusters
papers.abstract: Modern AI applications have expanded beyond text-only interaction into a wide range of multimodal scenarios, making multimodal large language models (MLLMs) crucial for both research and industry. However, compared with traditional decoder-only LLM training, large-scale MLLM training often shows much lower MFU. We analyze the key pain points in MLLM training and introduce Mpipe, which uses a schedule algebra to derive concrete runtime behavior from a compact schedule specification. From this algebra, Mpipe derives transpose, a multimodal-aware heterogeneous parallel schedule that remaps modality-encoder computation into otherwise idle pipeline regions. On Ascend 910C NPU clusters, Mpipe achieves 2.70x speedup in a small-scale setting and 1.21x speedup in a 512-card large-scale setting.

papers.title_zh: HyperParallel-Mpipe：面向超节点集群的 MLLM 训练优化可组合代数系统
papers.summary_cn: 本文分析多模态大模型大规模训练中模型算力利用率（MFU）偏低的关键痛点，提出 Mpipe 调度代数系统。该系统从紧凑的调度规格推导出具体运行时行为，并在此基础上导出 transpose——一种多模态感知的异构并行调度策略，将模态编码器的计算重新映射到原本空闲的流水线区域。在昇腾 910C NPU 集群上，小规模场景实现 2.70 倍加速，512 卡大规模场景实现 1.21 倍加速。
innovations: 提出 Mpipe 调度代数，从紧凑规格自动推导流水线运行时行为，降低手动调优复杂度
设计 transpose 异构并行调度，智能地将多模态编码器计算填充到流水线空闲区域，提升整体 MFU
在国产昇腾 910C NPU 集群上验证，512 卡规模仍取得 1.21 倍加速，具备较好可扩展性
papers.scenario_cn: 解决多模态大模型训练中 MFU 偏低的问题，特别适合包含视觉编码器等多模态组件的 LLM 训练场景，适用于超节点集群上的大规模分布式多模态训练
papers.title_en: HyperParallel-Mpipe: A Composable Algebra System for Optimizing MLLM Training over Supernode Clusters

papers.title: A Decomposable Probe for Few-Step Diffusion Models: Prompt, Latent, and Score Selectivity across Backbone Families and Distillation Paradigms
papers.abstract: Few-step distilled diffusion students cut text-to-image inference from ~50 to 1-8 network evaluations, but the quality gap is usually summarised by a single FID/CLIP scalar that cannot say which axis of the conditioning response changed, nor whether a behaviour comes from the architecture, the distillation objective, or simply from being a diffusion model. We replace the scalar with a decomposable probe that injects controlled perturbations along three layers (prompt encoder, denoiser input, denoiser output) under three modes (mean, variance, scale) and six strengths, reporting a bootstrap-median Bures W2^2 selectivity ratio on Inception features. Under a single matched estimator across 23 models -- five teachers and 18 distilled students spanning five backbone families (SDXL, SD1.5, SD3.5, PixArt-alpha, FLUX), three architecture classes (UNet, DiT, MMDiT), and five distillation paradigms -- the three layers read three empirically separable factors: the prompt layer is a universal prompt-mean response (a sanity channel, not a discriminator), the latent layer reads the prediction type, and the score layer reads the distillation objective. Our main result: within this sweep, the latent layer is a near-binary detector of rectified-flow backbones. Its ratio exceeds 1 across a sustained low-to-mid band only for rectified-flow models (SD3.5, FLUX); no epsilon-prediction model qualifies. A matched epsilon-prediction control (PixArt-alpha) rules out wide-T5 conditioning, and the fingerprint survives adversarial (ADD) distillation as both teacher and student. Two secondary score-layer findings hold under narrower scopes: a canonical 4-step ADD-vs-rest contrast on the UNet families with a non-ADD baseline, and a CI-separated trajectory-rollout early-strength score spike on both UNet and DiT. All ratios are CI-citable under one estimator; we release the per-cell tables and the estimator.

papers.title_zh: 面向少步扩散模型的可分解探针：跨骨干网络家族与蒸馏范式的提示、隐空间与分数选择性分析
papers.institution: 未明确披露（独立作者 Patrick Mu Haojie）
papers.summary_cn: 本文提出一种可分解探针（Decomposable Probe），用于诊断少步蒸馏扩散模型的行为差异来源。传统评估仅用单一的 FID/CLIP 标量，无法区分模型的改变是来自架构、蒸馏目标还是扩散模型本身。该方法在提示编码器、去噪器输入、去噪器输出三个层面注入受控扰动（均值/方差/尺度三种模式、六种强度），基于 Bootstrap 中值 Bures W2² 选择性比率对 Inception 特征进行度量。作者在 23 个模型（5 个教师 + 18 个蒸馏学生，涵盖 SDXL、SD1.5、SD3.5、PixArt-alpha、FLUX 五种骨干家族，UNet/DiT/MMDiT 三类架构，五种蒸馏范式）上统一评估，发现三个层面对应三个可分离因子。
innovations: 提出首个可分解的诊断探针框架，将 FID/CLIP 单一标量替换为三层、三模式、六强度的扰动分析，能够独立分离扩散模型中提示编码、隐空间和分数层各自的行为贡献
发现隐空间层（latent layer）是 rectified-flow 骨干网络的近二元检测器——只有 rectified-flow 模型（SD3.5、FLUX）在低中频段的选择性比率持续超过 1，epsilon-prediction 模型无一达标
通过严格的消融实验（PixArt-alpha 作为 epsilon-prediction 对照）排除了 wide-T5 条件编码的混淆因素，并证明该指纹特征在对抗性蒸馏（ADD）中从教师到学生均能保留
揭示了分数层（score layer）在 UNet 家族上可区分 4-step ADD 蒸馏与非 ADD 基线，且在 UNet 和 DiT 上均观测到轨迹 rollout 早期强度的分数尖峰
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于扩散模型社区对蒸馏学生模型进行细粒度诊断，帮助研究者区分模型行为是来自骨干架构（如 rectified-flow vs epsilon-prediction）、蒸馏范式（如 ADD vs 非对抗性蒸馏）还是提示编码设计；也可作为标准化工具用于模型选择、蒸馏方法比较和可解释性分析。
papers.title_en: A Decomposable Probe for Few-Step Diffusion Models: Prompt, Latent, and Score Selectivity across Backbone Families and Distillation Paradigms

papers.title: CURE: Controllable Unified Image Restoration for Complex Degradations
papers.abstract: The presence of composite degradations poses a significant challenge, since the underlying corruption factors exhibit complex and interdependent interactions. Even when the degradation types are known, accurately restoring the image remains difficult due to the intertwined nature of their effects and the need for selective control during the recovery process. To address this, we introduce CURE, a unified framework that enables controllable restoration in complex degradation settings by learning disentangled and adjustable representations. CURE is driven by four complementary objectives. First, an identity embedding is incorporated, along with a reconstruction constraint, to ensure that the model can reproduce the input image when restoration is unnecessary. Second, the ratio control mechanism blends the identity embedding with degradation-specific embeddings using user-regulated mixing ratios, allowing continuous control over restoration intensity. Third, an intermediate loss is applied to supervise stepwise outputs, each encouraged to tackle the removal of only a single degradation factor within a composite mixture. Finally, a permutation-invariant loss ensures that the model achieves consistent restoration quality regardless of the order in which multiple degradations are addressed. Since CURE modifies only the training strategy and not the underlying network architecture, it can be seamlessly integrated into existing controllable restoration models. Experiments demonstrate that CURE delivers state-of-the-art performance on composite degradation benchmarks, while enabling both selective and jointly fused restoration through flexible modulation of embedding ratios. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/bo-oseng/CURE.

Second, the ratio control mechanism blends the identity embedding with degradation-specific embeddings using user-regulated mixing ratios, allowing continuous control over restoration intensity. Third, an intermediate loss is applied to supervise stepwise outputs, each encouraged to tackle the removal of only a single degradation factor within a composite mixture. Finally, a permutation-invariant loss ensures that the model achieves consistent restoration quality regardless of the order in which multiple degradations are addressed. Since CURE modifies only the training strategy and not the underlying network architecture, it can be seamlessly integrated into existing controllable restoration models. Experiments demonstrate that CURE delivers state-of-the-art performance on composite degradation benchmarks, while enabling both selective and jointly fused restoration through flexible modulation of embedding ratios. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/bo-oseng/CURE.
papers.title_zh: CURE：面向复杂退化的可控统一图像恢复框架
papers.summary_cn: 本文提出CURE，一个统一的可控图像恢复框架，专门应对混合退化场景（如同时存在模糊、噪声、低分辨率等）中退化因素相互交织的难题。CURE通过学习解耦且可调节的表征来实现灵活控制。核心包含四个互补目标：(1) 身份嵌入 + 重建约束，确保无需恢复时能复现原图；(2) 比例控制机制，通过用户调节的身份嵌入与退化特定嵌入的混合比例连续控制恢复强度；(3) 中间层损失监督逐步输出，每一步只负责去除单一退化因子；(4) 置换不变性损失，保证多种退化处理的顺序不影响最终恢复质量。CURE仅修改训练策略而不改变网络架构，可无缝融入现有可控恢复模型。实验在复合退化基准上达到SOTA。
innovations: 提出四目标联合训练策略实现复合退化下的可控恢复：身份嵌入（保底重建）、比例控制（连续调节恢复强度）、中间损失（解耦单退化因子）、置换不变损失（消除处理顺序敏感性）
不修改网络骨干架构，仅通过训练策略创新即可集成到现有任意可控恢复模型中，即插即用
支持选择性和联合融合两种恢复模式——用户可灵活调控各退化因子的混合比例，实现从局部修复到全面恢复的连续调控
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于图像中同时存在多种未知或已知复合退化（如低光照+运动模糊+噪声、压缩伪影+低分辨率等）的真实场景，如监控图像增强、手机摄影后期修复、老旧照片数字化恢复等需要精细化分步控制的应用
papers.title_en: CURE: Controllable Unified Image Restoration for Complex Degradations

papers.title: R3D: Quantitative 3D Spatial Reasoning for Egocentric Wearables
papers.abstract: Quantitative 3D spatial reasoning from egocentric RGB-D video is a critical capability for next-generation wearable assistants. Yet existing benchmarks do not reflect the challenges of handling (1) natural egocentric video, (2) posed RGB-D video inputs, and (3) challenging quantitative 3D spatial reasoning Q&A. To fill this gap, we introduce R3D-Bench (Reasoning in 3D), a benchmark of 3,033 quantitative spatial reasoning questions across 15 types -- spanning multiple-choice, distance-based, and volumetric reasoning questions -- built on top of 57 egocentric video sequences from Aria Digital Twin. To set a strong baseline on this dataset, we introduce R3D, a model-agnostic spatial tool-calling framework. In contrast to existing approaches that directly embed 3D information into the model's input representation, R3D constructs a 3D scene from video using segmentation and depth-lifted object representations. It provides this information to an LLM through eight composable spatial tools. On R3D-Bench, R3D with Qwen3-VL 235B achieves 73.5% mean relative accuracy, substantially outperforming the best depth-enabled baseline (CuTR+Tools, 61.9%) and the best RGB-only baseline (Gemini 3 Flash, 46.5%).

papers.title_zh: R3D：面向第一人称可穿戴设备的定量三维空间推理
papers.summary_cn: 本文提出R3D-Bench基准和R3D框架，用于解决可穿戴助手在自然第一人称RGB-D视频中进行定量3D空间推理的挑战。R3D-Bench包含3033个定量空间推理问题（多选题、距离推理、体积推理等15种类型），基于Aria Digital Twin的57个第一人称视频序列构建。R3D是模型无关的空间工具调用框架，通过分割和深度提升的对象表示构建3D场景，为LLM提供8种可组合的空间工具完成推理。

papers.title: SafeGuard: A Multi-Agent Perception-Reasoning Framework for Social-Risk AI-Generated Video Detection
papers.abstract: As video generation paradigms evolve from localized manipulation to full-scene synthesis, AI-generated video detection becomes increasingly challenging, as forgeries exhibit coherent global structure and high perceptual realism. However, existing benchmarks are biased toward perceptual fidelity and primarily evaluate detectors based on perceptual artifacts, providing limited coverage of scenarios that require reasoning about violations of physical laws, structural coherence, or social logic. This dataset bias shapes current approaches and results in a Perception-Reasoning Gap: artifact-centric models capture low-level statistical irregularities yet lack semantic inference, whereas vision-language models perform semantic reasoning but remain insensitive to fine-grained forensic cues. To bridge this gap, we propose SafeGuard, a multi-agent framework that enables collaborative specialization between forensic perception and semantic reasoning. A hierarchical perceptual solver extracts fine-grained forensic evidence, while a self-reflective verifier enforces consistency between semantic inference and physical plausibility, forming an interpretable evidence chain. To support evaluation, we introduce SafeVid, a novel AI-generated video detection benchmark comprising 20K videos spanning 10 social risk categories, designed to evaluate physical plausibility, structural consistency, and the rationality of social behaviors. Extensive experiments demonstrate the generalization of SafeGuard, improving accuracy on SafeVid by +18.7% and consistently outperforming prior methods across four public benchmarks.

papers.title: VideoSearcher: Empowering Video Deep Research with Multi-Tool Agentic Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Video understanding is moving beyond closed-context perception toward open-world evidence exploration, a paradigm formalized as Video Deep Research (VDR). However, existing multimodal search agents primarily target static images, and the current VDR benchmark relies on text-centric retrieval that discards crucial visual information. To address these limitations, we propose VideoSearcher, a closed-loop agentic framework that empowers Vision-Language Models with multi-tool reasoning for VDR. VideoSearcher unifies temporal localization, spatial focusing, and multimodal search within a single reasoning trajectory, enabling agents to progressively ground visual clues, retrieve relevant evidence, and synthesize answers. To optimize knowledge-intensive reasoning trajectories, we propose Bi-branch Sequence Policy Optimization (BiSPO), a reinforcement learning algorithm that decouples tool-invocation optimization from answer-accuracy optimization. This design provides stable learning signals for both evidence-grounded reasoning and purposeful tool use. Furthermore, we construct VideoSearch-QA, the first benchmark designed to evaluate open-world video information grounding and multimodal search-based reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VideoSearcher significantly outperforms prior open-source agentic baselines across various search-oriented and multimodal understanding benchmarks.

papers.title_zh: VideoSearcher：利用强化学习的多工具智能体推理实现视频深度研究
papers.summary_cn: VideoSearcher 是一个闭环智能体框架，旨在将视频理解从封闭的感知任务扩展到开放世界的证据探索——即视频深度研究（VDR）。现有的多模态搜索智能体主要针对静态图像，而当前的 VDR 基准依赖基于文本的检索，丢失了关键的视觉信息。VideoSearcher 将时间定位、空间聚焦和多模态搜索统一在单个推理轨迹中，使智能体能够逐步定位视觉线索、检索相关证据并综合答案。为了优化知识密集型推理轨迹，作者提出了双分支序列策略优化（BiSPO），一种将工具调用优化与答案准确性优化解耦的强化学习算法，为基于证据的推理和有目的的工具使用提供稳定的学习信号。此外，作者还构建了 VideoSearch-QA，这是首个评估开放世界视频信息定位和多模态搜索推理的基准。大量实验表明，VideoSearcher 在各类搜索导向和多模态理解基准上显著优于先前的开源智能体基线。
innovations: 提出 VideoSearcher 闭环智能体框架，将时间定位、空间聚焦和多模态搜索统一在单一推理轨迹中，实现端到端的视频深度研究
提出 BiSPO（双分支序列策略优化）强化学习算法，将工具调用优化与答案准确性优化解耦，避免联合优化中梯度冲突导致的不稳定问题
构建 VideoSearch-QA 基准，首个专门评估开放世界视频信息定位和多模态搜索推理能力的评测集

papers.title: SkillOpt-Lite: Better and Faster Agent Self-evolution via One Line of Vibe
papers.abstract: While skill optimization for autonomous agents has gained traction, existing methods rely on complex pipelines. This leaves a fundamental question unaddressed: What constitutes a minimal viable pipeline for skill optimization, where every component is justified by theory or empirical necessity? We formalize skill optimization via Zeroth-Order (ZO) optimization, mapping classical counterparts (central difference, trust regions) to recent literature. Noting that unlike blind numerical perturbations in classical ZO, skill trajectories serve as interpretable debugging feedback. Grounded in Claude Code philosophy and PAC learning, we establish three principles for convergence and generalization: file-system-based trajectory exploration, consensus attribute mining, and independent validation gating. Eliminating redundancies, we propose SkillOpt-Lite. It accelerates convergence and outperforms full SkillOpt: improving LiveMath by +8.8 points on GPT-5.5 and +25.4 points on GPT-5.4-nano, allowing the nano model to surpass standard GPT-5.4 optimized by SkillOpt. Finally, we integrate our framework into production coding agents like VSCode Copilot, enabling developers to evolve agent skills via one line of vibe. Because our framework treats all agent components simply as standard editable code, this minimal pipeline naturally generalizes to full harness optimization (HarnessOpt). On SpreadsheetBench, HarnessOpt enables GPT-5.4-nano to achieve 0.7758 accuracy, outperforming the larger GPT-5.5 running standard pipelines (0.7620). Code is available at https://github.com/EvolvingLMMs-Lab/SkillOpt-Lite.

papers.title: CONTRA: Red-Teaming Configurations of Personalizable Agents
papers.abstract: Recent tools such as OpenClaw have extended the capabilities of LLM-based agents from simple dialog-based systems to fully autonomous agents. These systems allow personalization of the agent through modifiable internal files and the installation of skills. While this enables deployment in a wide range of settings and the automation of diverse tasks, greater capability and autonomy increases the risk of malicious actions being executed unintentionally. In this work, we explore the interplay between agent configuration and the risk of executing dangerous actions without explicit instruction. To this end, we propose CONfiguration Tree-search for Red-teaming Agents (CONTRA), an LLM-assisted tree-search algorithm that discovers agent configurations resulting in the execution of malicious actions. CONTRA works by reasoning about benign yet dangerous configurations and evaluating them in a simulated environment. We construct a dataset of the 473 most popular skills from a public repository, along with 2-5 corresponding malicious target actions per skill. In a large-scale analysis, we find that 75.1% of skills have at least one configuration resulting in the execution of a malicious action, most of which have not been detected as containing malicious content by existing scans. Overall, CONTRA successfully identifies a configuration leading to the execution of the target action in 39.2% of all tested cases. Our findings demonstrate that current agents provide insufficient safety with respect to personalization.

papers.title_zh: CONTRA：可个性化智能体的配置红队测试
papers.summary_cn: 本文针对基于LLM的可个性化智能体（如OpenClaw）的安全风险展开研究。这类智能体允许用户通过修改内部文件和安装技能来自定义行为，但更强的自主性也增加了无意识执行恶意操作的风险。作者提出了CONfiguration Tree-search for Red-teaming Agents（CONTRA），一种LLM辅助的树搜索算法，能够自动发现导致智能体执行恶意动作的配置组合。研究基于公开仓库中最流行的473个技能构建数据集，为每个技能定义了2–5个对应的恶意目标行为。大规模分析发现，75.1%的技能存在至少一种配置可触发恶意行为，而现有扫描工具大多未能检测到这些配置。CONTRA在39.2%的测试案例中成功找到了能执行目标恶意行为的配置，揭示当前智能体在个性化安全方面存在显著不足。
innovations: 提出CONTRA算法，将智能体配置搜索形式化为树搜索问题，结合LLM推理进行红队测试配置发现
构建了473个流行技能的大规模数据集，并系统标注了每个技能对应的恶意目标行为，为个性化智能体安全评估提供基准
揭示了现有安全扫描工具在检测恶意配置方面的盲区——75.1%的技能存在可触发恶意行为的配置，但大多未被已有检测方法发现
提出'良性但危险'（benign yet dangerous）的配置概念，即单看无害的组合在协同作用下可产生恶意后果
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于任何支持用户自定义配置和技能安装的LLM Agent平台的安全审计环节。安全团队可在发布前使用CONTRA自动化搜索可能被恶意利用的配置组合，识别潜在风险点。同时也适用于Agent平台的持续安全监控，以及个性化Agent应用的安全评估标准制定。

papers.title: Flex-Forcing: Towards a Unified Autoregressive and Bidirectional Video Diffusion Model
papers.abstract: Recent progress in large-scale generative models has substantially advanced video generation, yet existing methods remain constrained by a rigid inference paradigm. Bidirectional diffusion models excel at global coherence and visual fidelity but suffer from slow inference, while autoregressive models offer efficient and streaming generation at the cost of long-range consistency and exposure bias. We introduce Flex-Forcing, a unified training and inference framework that enables a video diffusion model to seamlessly operate under both bidirectional and autoregressive generation regimes. The core idea is a flexible chunking mechanism jointly defined over the temporal axis and denoising steps. This design allows the model to (1) perform flexible chunking according to different device budgets, (2) perform bidirectional inference across chunks for global structure planning, while generating frames autoregressively within each chunk for efficient and fine-grained synthesis, and (3) perform any-order, any-timestep autoregressive generation without the strict causal constraint. Extensive experiments on multiple video generation benchmarks demonstrate that Flex-Forcing achieves consistently better video quality, long-video stability than strong baselines with a rigid inference schedule, while offering faster inference.

papers.title_zh: Flex-Forcing：迈向统一的自回归与双向视频扩散模型
papers.summary_cn: 本文提出Flex-Forcing，一个统一的训练和推理框架，使视频扩散模型能同时在双向和自回归两种生成模式下无缝运行。核心思想是一种在时间轴和去噪步骤上联合定义的灵活分块机制，支持根据设备预算动态分块、跨分块双向推理规划全局结构、块内自回归生成实现高效细粒度合成。
innovations: 首个统一双向与自回归视频扩散的训练-推理框架，突破现有方法推理范式固定的限制
设计灵活的时间-去噪联合分块机制，支持任意顺序、任意去噪步的自回归生成，无需严格因果约束
在多个视频生成基准上同时实现更优的视频质量、长视频稳定性和更快的推理速度

papers.title: Variable Bit-width Quantization: Learning Per-Group Precision for "Bigger-but-Smaller" Language Models
papers.abstract: Low-bit quantization shrinks language models but treats precision as a single global hyper-parameter: every weight uses the same bit-width. We introduce Variable Bit-width Quantization (VBQ), a training-time method in which each contiguous group of 64 weights learns its own resolution from {1,2,4,8} bits via a Gumbel-Softmax relaxation, trained jointly by an alternating optimization that gives the precision logits a clean, task-aligned signal. VBQ discovers a consistent, strongly heterogeneous allocation within individual projection types, not merely across layers, impossible to express with per-layer methods: 69% of groups collapse to 1 bit, the LM head averages 1.09 bits, while the first MLP block keeps ~2.5 bits. This pattern is stable enough to freeze into a fixed recipe and reuse without further search. The recipe yields a "bigger-but-smaller" regime: a 131M model at 1.82 mean bits reaches perplexity 4.2 on TinyStories, beating a 55M FP16 model (PPL 4.4) at 3.8x less storage, and lets a 1.46B model on FineWeb-Edu match a 593M FP16 control at ~3.7x less storage with 2.5x more parameters. As quality-per-byte, VBQ is 3.9-8.4x more efficient than FP16. The recipe maps directly to packed low-bit storage, so it also accelerates inference: with custom fused dequantize-and-multiply kernels, memory-bandwidth-bound autoregressive decode is faster at equal output, and the speedup grows with scale (parity at 131M, 1.9x at 1.0B, 4.7x at 9B on Apple silicon). A distributional analysis (KL divergence and argmax-flip rate) reveals a striking mechanism: deeper layers progressively self-heal the quantization error injected by early layers. The win is a from-scratch, train-time phenomenon; scaling the search economically beyond 1.5B parameters remains open. VBQ reframes precision as a learnable, non-uniform resource and shows that spending a fixed bit budget unevenly beats spending it uniformly.

papers.title: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Carbon-Aware AI Data Centers in Power Distribution Systems
papers.abstract: Eco-friendly energy management for artificial intelligence data centers (AIDCs) is crucial because of the significant increase in energy consumption-induced carbon emissions from AIDCs resulting from the rapid expansion of AI applications. This paper proposes a hierarchical carbon-aware multi-agent reinforcement learning (CA-MARL) framework for robust and efficient operations of AIDCs under uncertainties while ensuring low-carbon operation of power distribution systems. The framework comprises a workload manager (WM) agent and multiple local AIDC agents trained using a multi-agent transformer method, corresponding to a global AIDC aggregator and a local AIDC operator, respectively. Leveraging AIDC operation data along with nodal carbon intensity (NCI) calculated from the carbon emission flow-integrated distribution system operator problem, the WM agent spatially allocates AI training and inference jobs among all AIDCs. Based on the jobs allocated from the WM agent and NCI information, each AIDC agent schedules economical and eco-friendly operations of the AIDC by performing the following tasks: i) temporal shifting of training jobs, ii) spatial allocation of training graphics processing unit (GPU) blocks and inference GPUs within the AIDC, and iii) control of the supply air temperature of the cooling system. The effectiveness of the proposed framework was assessed using an IEEE 33-node power distribution system.

papers.title_zh: 面向配电系统的碳感知AI数据中心层级式多智能体强化学习框架
papers.summary_cn: 本文提出层级式碳感知多智能体强化学习（CA-MARL）框架，用于在不确定性下实现AI数据中心的鲁棒高效运行并保障配电系统低碳运营。框架包含工作负载管理器（WM）智能体和多个本地AIDC智能体：WM智能体利用节点碳强度信息在数据中心间空间分配AI训练/推理任务；各AIDC智能体则通过时间迁移训练任务、空间分配GPU块以及控制冷却系统送风温度三个维度进行联合优化。在IEEE 33节点配电系统上的实验验证了框架有效性。
innovations: 提出层级式CA-MARL框架，将全局工作负载分配与局部数据中心调度解耦，实现跨数据中心的碳感知协同优化
利用多智能体Transformer方法联合训练WM和本地AIDC智能体，结合节点碳强度（NCI）进行决策
在单一AIDC内联合优化训练任务时间迁移、GPU空间分配和冷却系统送风温度三个调度维度
papers.scenario_cn: 解决AI数据中心能耗激增导致的高碳排放问题，适用于配电网场景下多个AI数据中心的低碳运营与调度
papers.title_en: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Carbon-Aware AI Data Centers in Power Distribution Systems

papers.title: Distill Where the Student Goes: Teacher-Regularized RL for English-Evidence Cross-Lingual RAG
papers.abstract: Cross-lingual retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is often deployed in an English-evidence regime, where users query in diverse languages but retrieved passages remain English. In this setting, generation can fail despite strong base models: English evidence induces language drift (English or code-switching outputs) and models use evidence unreliably when producing non-English answers. We attribute these failures to two post-training challenges: (i) errors are prefix-dependent, so fixed-trajectory supervision suffers from prefix mismatch; and (ii) sequence-level (partly discrete / judge-based) rewards yield noisy credit assignment and high-variance updates. We propose TR-RAG, a teacher-regularized RL recipe that couples reward optimization with on-policy distillation on student-visited prefixes. A compact student samples on-policy answers, while a stronger frozen teacher is queried only on those prefixes and provides a prefix-wise student-to-teacher reverse-KL anchor. We further introduce a reward decomposition for English-evidence multilingual generation, combining language consistency, character 3-gram recall, and an LLM-judge score for evidence-grounded correctness. Across three benchmarks (BioASQ-ENKB5, Hotpot-ENKB5, and naturally multilingual MKQA) and two backbones, TR-RAG improves the composite of language adherence and evidence-grounded correctness over strong baselines. Crucially, the teacher anchor acts as a safety net: on in-domain languages it prevents the large language-consistency collapses (up to ~27 percentage points) that reward-only RL can suffer by drifting below even the base model, while on distant out-of-distribution languages, where reward-only RL stalls at the base model's ceiling, it still improves evidence grounding; and on character 3-gram recall the compact student sometimes surpasses its 70B teacher.

papers.title_zh: 随学生轨迹蒸馏：教师正则化强化学习用于英语证据的跨语言检索增强生成
papers.summary_cn: 跨语言检索增强生成（RAG）常采用英语证据模式——用户用多种语言提问但检索的段落是英文，导致输出语言漂移（生成英文或中英混杂）以及模型对证据使用不可靠。本文提出 TR-RAG，一种教师正则化强化学习方案，将奖励优化与学生访问前缀上的在策略蒸馏相结合：小型学生模型采样在策略答案，冻结的更强教师模型仅在这些前缀上提供逐前缀的反向KL散度锚点。同时引入面向英语证据多语言生成的奖励分解，包含语言一致性、字符三元组召回率和LLM裁判分数。
innovations: 提出教师正则化RL框架TR-RAG，在奖励优化同时对学生访问过的前缀进行在策略蒸馏，缓解前缀失配导致的错误传播
设计教师-学生反向KL锚点机制，教师仅在学生实际探索的前缀上提供正则化约束，避免固定轨迹监督的偏差
引入面向英语证据多语言生成的奖励分解（语言一致性+字符n-gram召回+LLM裁判的基于证据正确性评分），解决序列级奖励噪声大、信用分配困难的问题
教师锚点作为安全网，在领域内语言上防止奖励-only RL导致的高达27个百分点的语言一致性崩溃；在远域分布外语言上仍能提升证据基础
papers.scenario_cn: 解决多语言用户使用英语语料库进行RAG时的语言漂移和证据不可靠问题，适用于任何需要非英语问答但检索语料为英语的应用场景，如多语言客服、跨语言知识问答、BioASQ等医学问答和MKQA等多语言开放域QA任务
papers.title_en: Distill Where the Student Goes: Teacher-Regularized RL for English-Evidence Cross-Lingual RAG

papers.title: Beyond Forecasting: The Belief-to-Trade Layer in Prediction-Market Agents
papers.abstract: Forecasting future events has attracted growing attention as a testbed for general-purpose AI. A natural way to ground this evaluation is let the models trade in the prediction markets. Trading, however, requires more than forecasting. Moreover, recent benchmarks report a substantial gap between calibrated probability scores and the trading results. We propose Raven-Agent, to the best of our knowledge, the first autonomous trading agent for prediction markets. On a controlled replay over an archived decision set, our architecture achieves the only positive return and the only positive risk-adjusted return among all tested policies. We have released our code in https://github.com/Alchemist-X/predict-raven .

papers.title_zh: 超越预测：预测市场智能体中的信念到交易层
papers.summary_cn: 本文提出Raven-Agent，据作者称是首个面向预测市场的自主交易智能体。作者指出现有预测基准中校准概率得分与实际交易结果之间存在显著差距——模型能校准地预测概率，却无法将其转化为盈利交易策略。Raven-Agent在存档决策集的受控回测中实现了唯一正回报和唯一正风险调整回报，优于所有对比策略。代码已开源。
innovations: 提出首个自主预测市场交易智能体Raven-Agent，填补从概率预测到实际交易决策的空白
揭示校准概率分数与真实交易结果之间的实质性差距，证明预测能力不等于交易能力
在存档决策集受控回测中实现唯一正回报和正风险调整回报，超越所有对比策略
papers.scenario_cn: 解决AI在预测市场中从单纯预测到实际交易决策的鸿沟，适用于金融预测市场、事件合约交易等需要将信念转化为实际交易行为的场景
papers.title_en: Beyond Forecasting: The Belief-to-Trade Layer in Prediction-Market Agents

papers.title: Awakening Diffusion Transformers: Eliciting Stronger Generation and Understanding via Massive Activation Modulation
papers.abstract: Massive Activations (MAs) have been widely observed in Transformer-based models, yet their structure and functional roles in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) remain insufficiently understood. In this work, we systematically analyze MAs in representative DiTs and find that they are spatially distributed across image tokens while concentrated in a small set of fixed feature dimensions. We further show that these dimensions are closely aligned with AdaLN residual scaling factors and are primarily modulated by the denoising timestep rather than text conditions. This structure leads to two task-dependent effects: for generation, MAs are critical for fine-grained detail synthesis while having limited influence on global semantics; for understanding, their shared high-magnitude directions make raw DiT features overly similar across spatial tokens and weaken dense feature discrimination. Based on these findings, we introduce Eliciting Massive Activation (EMA), a training-free framework that leverages Massive Activations (MAs) as a unified modulation signal to improve both generative and representational capabilities of DiTs. For generation, EMA proposes MA-driven Detail G}uidance (DG), which suppresses MA dimensions to construct a detail-deficient counterfactual prediction and guides sampling toward finer visual details. DG further supports efficient partial-forward inference, integration with classifier-free guidance, and token-level Local DG for refining selected image regions. For understanding, EMA introduces MA-modulated REPresentation extraction (MREP), which uses pretrained AdaLN channel-wise modulation to reduce MA directional dominance and concatenates spatially normalized MA maps to preserve useful spatial structure. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EMA consistently improves both the generation quality and representation capability of DiTs.

papers.title_zh: 唤醒扩散Transformer：通过大规模激活调控激发更强的生成与理解能力
papers.summary_cn: 本文系统分析了扩散Transformer（DiT）中的大规模激活（Massive Activations, MAs）现象。发现MAs在空间上分布于图像token中，但集中在少数固定的特征维度上，且这些维度与AdaLN残差缩放因子紧密对齐，主要由去噪时间步而非文本条件调控。MAs对生成任务中的细粒度细节合成至关重要，但对全局语义影响有限；在理解任务中，其高幅度方向导致DiT特征在空间token间过度相似，削弱了密集特征判别力。基于此，提出无训练框架EMA，通过统一调控MAs信号同时提升DiT的生成与表征能力。
innovations: 首次系统分析DiT中大规模激活（MAs）的结构特性，揭示其空间分布与特征维度集中的规律，并发现其与AdaLN残差缩放因子的对齐关系
提出MA驱动的细节引导（Detail Guidance, DG），通过抑制MA维度构建细节缺失的反事实预测，引导采样朝向更精细的视觉细节，并支持高效的partial-forward推理、与无分类器引导的集成及局部区域精细调控
提出MA调制表征提取（MREP），利用预训练AdaLN通道级调制降低MA方向主导性，并拼接空间归一化的MA图以保留有用空间结构
统一框架EMA在不经过训练的条件下同时提升DiT的生成质量与表征能力，弥合了生成模型与理解模型之间的鸿沟
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于基于扩散Transformer的文生图/图生图任务中提升生成细节质量，以及利用DiT作为视觉骨干网络的下游理解任务（如密集预测、语义分割、特征提取）中增强特征判别力。特别适合需要高保真细节生成与强视觉表征能力兼具的应用场景。
papers.title_en: Awakening Diffusion Transformers: Eliciting Stronger Generation and Understanding via Massive Activation Modulation

papers.title: FairFlow: Demystifying and Mitigating Stereotype Bias in Text-to-Image Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Multimodal diffusion transformers (MM-DiTs) have emerged as the prevalent backbone for modern text-to-image generation systems. However, they exhibit critical alignment vulnerabilities, systematically manifesting severe stereotype biases even under benign prompts. This poses a significant risk of algorithmic discrimination in deployed systems. Since most existing mitigation strategies were tailored for legacy U-Net architectures, the precise remediation of these vulnerabilities in MM-DiTs remains a critical open challenge. In this work, we first investigate the root cause of this vulnerability via mechanistic analysis. We reveal that bias representations in MM-DiTs are not uniformly distributed across depth, but are mediated by a sparse set of layers functioning as internal semantic binding hubs. These hubs exhibit a stage-wise propagation driving bias manifestation: early hubs establish the structural templates susceptible to bias, middle hubs actively extract core stereotypical concepts from textual conditioning, and late hubs globally solidify these biases through visual self-attention. Leveraging these architectural insights, we propose FairFlow, an intrinsic, mechanism-guided mitigation framework. FairFlow acts as an internal regulator by employing sparse steering: it learns attribute-specific fair directions and injects them exclusively at the identified semantic hubs within a constrained inference window. Evaluations on FLUX.1-dev and Stable Diffusion~3 demonstrate that FairFlow effectively neutralizes these stereotypical vulnerabilities across gender, race, and intersectional settings, achieving an optimal fairness-fidelity balance. With near-zero inference overhead and robustness to complex prompts, FairFlow provides a lightweight and practical bias mitigation for large-scale deployed MM-DiT systems. Code and datasets will be publicly released upon acceptance.

papers.title_zh: FairFlow：揭秘与缓解文生图扩散Transformer中的刻板印象偏见
papers.summary_cn: 本文研究了多模态扩散Transformer（MM-DiT）在文生图系统中存在的刻板印象偏见问题。通过机制分析发现，偏见表征并非均匀分布在网络深度中，而是由一组稀疏的层作为“内部语义绑定枢纽”介导。这些枢纽呈现阶段式传播：早期枢纽建立易受偏见影响的结构模板，中期枢纽从文本条件中提取核心刻板概念，晚期枢纽通过视觉自注意力全局固化偏见。现有缓解方法多针对传统U-Net架构设计，无法直接适用于MM-DiT。
innovations: 1. 首次从机制层面揭示MM-DiT中偏见表征的根因，发现其由稀疏的语义绑定枢纽层分阶段传播；2. 提出FairFlow框架，一种内在的、机制引导的偏见缓解方法，通过学习属性特定公平方向，仅在识别出的语义枢纽层注入稀疏调控信号；3. 在FLUX.1-dev和Stable Diffusion 3上验证，FairFlow在性别、种族及交叉场景下均能有效中和刻板偏见，且几乎零推理开销、对复杂提示鲁棒。
papers.scenario_cn: 文生图大模型（如FLUX、SD3）的公平性治理与部署，特别适用于需要大规模部署且对偏见敏感的应用场景如AI艺术创作、广告生成、媒体内容生产等。
papers.title_en: FairFlow: Demystifying and Mitigating Stereotype Bias in Text-to-Image Diffusion Transformers

papers.title: DREAMSTEER: Latent World Models Can Steer VLA Policies During Deployment Without Any Finetuning
papers.abstract: Pretrained vision-language-action (VLA) policies show promising zero-shot generalization, but often fail under deployment-time distribution shift, leading to decreased robustness and inconsistent instruction following. While prior work commonly tackles this by finetuning on in-distribution data, it assumes demonstrations collected on tasks in the target environment. In this work, we propose DREAMSTEER, a deployment-time steering framework for pretrained VLAs without any finetuning or parameter modifications. The key insight in DREAMSTEER is to leverage a latent world model and a value model to steer pretrained VLA policies. During deployment, DREAMSTEER samples candidate action chunks from a VLA policy and predefined motion primitives, imagines their outcomes using an action-conditioned latent world model, and ranks the imagined trajectories with a language-conditioned value model. Across four real-world manipulation benchmarks with unseen objects, DREAMSTEER improves task success rate from 23.75% to 66.25% and instruction-following accuracy from 38.75% to 56.25% over the base VLA policy.

papers.title_zh: DREAMSTEER：潜在世界模型在部署时无需微调即可引导VLA策略
papers.institution: Meta FAIR, 明尼苏达大学双城分校
papers.summary_cn: 提出DREAMSTEER框架，在部署时利用潜在世界模型和价值模型引导预训练的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略，无需任何微调或参数修改。该方法从VLA策略和预定义运动基元中采样候选动作块，用动作条件的潜在世界模型想象其执行结果，再通过语言条件的价值模型对想象轨迹进行排序选择最优动作。在四个真实机器人操作基准测试中，面对未见过的物体，任务成功率从23.75%提升至66.25%，指令跟随准确率从38.75%提升至56.25%。
innovations: 首次提出部署时（deployment-time）无需微调的VLA引导框架，利用预训练的潜在世界模型实现零样本分布偏移适应
构建候选动作池（VLA策略输出 + 预定义运动基元），通过世界模型想象未来状态再排序，而非直接信任VLA单次输出
使用语言条件的视觉-语言-动作-评论家（VLAC）模型作为价值函数，对多步想象轨迹进行指令对齐评分
世界模型在大规模机器人数据上预训练后冻结使用，不依赖目标环境的演示数据，具备跨任务零样本泛化能力
papers.scenario_cn: 解决预训练VLA策略在部署时因环境分布偏移（新物体、新场景）导致鲁棒性下降和指令跟随不一致的问题。适用于机器人操作任务，尤其是开放世界环境下需要快速适应未见物体和场景的部署场景，无需收集目标环境演示数据即可在线提升策略性能。
papers.title_en: DREAMSTEER: Latent World Models Can Steer VLA Policies During Deployment Without Any Finetuning

papers.title: Modeling the Impact of Visual Brand Language on Attention, Object Recognition, and Memory Retrieval
papers.abstract: Visual brand language is the set of visual properties that convey brand identity for a product. What is the impact of visual brand language on a person's ability to recognize and understand the functional identity of an object? Using an empirically supported modeling framework based on the JIM model of object recognition and the LISA model of analogical inference, we simulated the impact of visual brand language on object recognition, the allocation of attention, and retrieval of functional information about objects. Our simulations predict that brand information captures attention and can slow recognition of an object's functional category, with greater degrees of branding causing larger effects. These results have potential implications for the usability and experience of designed objects.

papers.title_zh: 建模视觉品牌语言对注意力、物体识别和记忆检索的影响
papers.institution: 伊利诺伊大学厄巴纳-香槟分校
papers.summary_cn: 基于JIM物体识别模型和LISA类比推理模型，构建计算建模框架模拟视觉品牌语言对物体识别、注意力分配和功能信息检索的影响。仿真预测表明，品牌视觉特征会捕获注意力，并可能减慢对物体功能类别的识别速度，品牌化程度越高，效应越显著。该研究为产品设计的可用性和用户体验提供了认知层面的理论预测。
innovations: 首次用量化计算认知模型（JIM + LISA）系统建模视觉品牌语言对认知过程的干扰效应，而非依赖传统行为实验
揭示了品牌视觉特征与物体功能识别之间的注意竞争机制，品牌化程度与识别延迟之间呈现单调关系
将类比推理机制（LISA）引入产品设计认知评估，为视觉品牌语言的认知代价提供了可量化的预测框架
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于产品设计、用户体验和人机交互领域，帮助设计师理解品牌视觉元素（Logo、配色、造型语言）对用户快速识别物体功能造成的潜在干扰。对需要平衡品牌辨识度与功能可用性的工业设计、界面设计和消费电子产品有指导意义。

papers.title: Joint distribution of upstream runoff governs downstream river-discharge prediction uncertainty in distributed ML models
papers.abstract: Uncertainty quantification of hydrological predictions is necessary to inform operational decisions. Recent generative machine-learning methods have advanced probabilistic streamflow prediction, but have remained confined to lumped models that predict a basin outlet directly. At the same time, deterministic LSTM runoff models are increasingly applied at grid or catchment scale and routed through river networks to produce spatially continuous, physically consistent discharge fields. This technical note argues that moving probabilistic prediction from lumped to distributed models introduces a specific new requirement: the joint distribution of upstream runoff generation must be sampled jointly. In lumped inference, the model predicts the outlet distribution directly and can modulate spread from basin attributes. In distributed inference, downstream discharge is obtained by routing many upstream runoff predictions, so independent local sampling averages uncertainty away. Using Japan as a case study, we train two probabilistic basin-scale runoff LSTMs and route their runoff through a Hayami routing scheme. Randomly matching upstream ensemble members produces severely under-dispersed downstream ensembles, whereas a simple quantile matching strategy restores much of the spread of the direct basin-scale reference. The shift from lumped to distributed probabilistic hydrology therefore requires explicit attention to the spatial joint structure of runoff uncertainty.

papers.title_zh: 上游径流联合分布主导分布式机器学习模型的下游河流流量预测不确定性
papers.institution: 雷丁大学、欧洲中期天气预报中心（ECMWF）、日本理化学研究所计算科学中心
papers.summary_cn: 本文揭示了一个关键问题：当将概率水文预测从集总式（lumped）模型扩展到分布式（distributed）模型时，上游径流的不确定性必须联合采样，否则独立采样会在汇流路由过程中平均化掉不确定性，导致下游预测过于自信。以日本793个水文测站为案例，训练了两类概率LSTM径流模型（非参数噪声扰动和参数化对数正态），通过Hayami路由方案汇流。实验证明，随机独立采样严重低估下游集合离散度（集合跨度缩小一半以上），而简单的分位数匹配策略可恢复大部分集合离散度和概率预测技能，使CRPS改善幅度超过随机采样与集总式基准差距的一半。
innovations: 首次明确提出分布式概率水文预测中的空间联合采样问题，并通过理论分析和实验验证其必要性——独立采样在大流域中灾难性地坍缩不确定性
在非参数和参数化两种概率径流模型上系统对比了随机匹配与分位数匹配的效果，证明该效应与不确定性表征方式无关，是路由汇聚过程的固有属性
建立了流域尺度依赖性规律：汇流上游测站数增加时独立采样技能急剧下降，而分位数匹配在中等规模流域恢复效果最佳（~10个上游测站）
给出了空间误差模式的详细地理分析，指出分位数匹配在正相关主导的区域（西部日本）优于集总式模型，而在水库调节/融雪区域（北海道）所有分布式方法均受限
papers.scenario_cn: 解决分布式概率水文预报中集合离散度崩溃问题，适用于需要全流域连续概率流量预测的洪水预警、水库调度、水资源管理场景。方法论对任何基于路由的分布式ML水文模型（LSTM、GNN等）具有普适指导意义，尤其适合大流域（数百级上游单元）的概率预报系统。
papers.title_en: Joint distribution of upstream runoff governs downstream river-discharge prediction uncertainty in distributed ML models

papers.title: Piecewise Dynamic Diffusion Regularization for Reconstruction of Cardiac Cine MRI
papers.abstract: Real-time cardiac cine MRI enables visualization of the beating heart during free breathing, but severe undersampling and motion make reconstruction highly challenging. A central challenge for reconstruction is incorporating powerful priors of cardiac anatomy while remaining computationally efficient. We propose Piecewise Dynamic Diffusion Regularization (PDDR), a reconstruction method that integrates a spatiotemporal diffusion model as a generative prior within a variational reconstruction framework for cine MRI. The model employs dedicated spatial layers to encode anatomical structure and temporal layers to capture cardiac motion learned from gated cine data. PDDR leverages the dynamic prior in a piecewise manner, enabling the efficient use of spatiotemporal diffusion models for processing of long real-time sequences. Experiments on retrospectively accelerated and prospective real-time cine MRI demonstrate that PDDR outperforms classical, unsupervised, and diffusion-based methods, delivering high-quality reconstructions with substantially reduced computation time compared to state-of-the-art baselines. These results highlight PDDR as a practical and scalable solution for free-breathing, real-time cardiac MRI. Code is available at https://github.com/MLI-lab/pddr.

papers.title_zh: 分段动态扩散正则化用于心脏电影MRI重建
papers.summary_cn: 实时心脏电影MRI能在自由呼吸下可视化跳动心脏，但严重欠采样和运动伪影使重建极具挑战。本文提出分段动态扩散正则化（PDDR），将时空扩散模型作为生成先验集成到变分重建框架中：模型使用专用空间层编码解剖结构、时间层捕获心脏运动，并通过分段方式利用动态先验，高效处理长实时序列。实验表明PDDR在回顾性加速和前瞻性实时心脏MRI上均优于经典方法、无监督方法和扩散方法，且计算时间大幅减少。
innovations: 将时空扩散模型作为生成先验集成到变分重建框架中，空间层和解剖结构+时间层捕获心脏运动，实现解剖先验与计算效率的兼顾
提出分段动态先验机制（Piecewise Dynamic Prior），使得时空扩散模型可高效处理长实时MRI序列，而不必对整个长序列一次性建模
在回顾性加速和前瞻性实时自由呼吸心脏MRI上均超越经典、无监督和扩散基线，且计算时间较SOTA方法大幅减少
papers.scenario_cn: 解决自由呼吸下实时心脏电影MRI重建中的严重欠采样和运动伪影问题，适用于临床实时心脏成像场景，可显著降低扫描时间并提升图像质量。代码已开源：https://github.com/MLI-lab/pddr
papers.title_en: Piecewise Dynamic Diffusion Regularization for Reconstruction of Cardiac Cine MRI

papers.title: RIGS-Refiner: Risk-Guided Recursive Refinement in Prediction Space for Colonoscopy Polyp Segmentation
papers.abstract: Post-refinement can improve colonoscopy segmentation after host inference, but many designs still rely on extra correction heads or multi-stage pipelines with non-negligible parameter or computational cost. For polyp segmentation, host predictions are often already reasonable globally, with remaining errors clustered around ambiguous boundaries and difficult local structures. These residual errors matter in colonoscopy images because useful masks need correct lesion coverage and clean contour delineation across subtle mucosal transitions. This setting favors selective local repair in prediction space over reprocessing the entire mask. We therefore propose RIGS-Refiner, a lightweight post-refinement plugin for risk-guided recursive refinement in prediction space. Starting from a frozen host anchor prediction, RIGS-Refiner extracts lightweight image priors and prediction cues, applies risk-guided update, and writes back residual corrections through a shared recursive cell. The module adds only +519 parameters and +0.631 GFLOPs, keeping the refinement path compact for deployment. Experiments use Kvasir-SEG for training and Kvasir, ClinicDB, ColonDB, and ETIS for evaluation under two frozen hosts, namely PraNet and SegFormer-B0. Results show consistent gains on both hosts and a favorable efficiency-accuracy trade-off against representative post-refinement methods. Code is available at https://github.com/tyui99/RIGS-Refiner.

papers.title_zh: RIGS-Refiner: 风险引导的预测空间递归精化方法用于结肠镜息肉分割
papers.summary_cn: 本文提出 RIGS-Refiner，一种轻量级后处理精化插件，针对结肠镜息肉分割中宿主模型预测后仍残留的边界模糊和局部结构错误进行选择性修复。RIGS-Refiner 从冻结的宿主锚点预测出发，提取轻量级图像先验和预测线索，应用风险引导更新，通过共享递归单元写回残差校正。该模块仅增加 519 个参数和 0.631 GFLOPs，计算开销极小。实验在 Kvasir-SEG 上训练，以 Kvasir、ClinicDB、ColonDB 和 ETIS 进行评估，使用 PraNet 和 SegFormer-B0 两种冻结宿主，均取得一致提升，展示了良好的效率-精度权衡。
innovations: 提出轻量级后精化插件 RIGS-Refiner，仅增加 519 个参数和 0.631 GFLOPs，适用于部署场景
风险引导的递归精化机制，在预测空间中有选择性地修复边界模糊和局部结构错误，而非重新处理整个掩码
共享递归单元设计，无需额外修正头或多阶段流水线，保持精化路径紧凑高效
结合轻量级图像先验和预测线索进行风险引导更新，实现细粒度的局部修复
papers.scenario_cn: 结肠镜息肉分割的后处理精化场景，适用于已有宿主模型（如 PraNet、SegFormer-B0）推理后，需要轻量级插件进一步提升分割边界质量和病灶覆盖准确性的医学图像分析应用

papers.title: AquaGen: Scaling generative models to molecular dynamics precision on thousands of atoms
papers.abstract: We present AquaGen, the first all-atom, explicit solvent, periodic-boundary-condition-aware generative model that produces molecular configurations from the Boltzmann distribution at a fraction of the cost of molecular dynamics (MD). This is in contrast with existing generative models that remove degrees of freedom by operating on coarse-grained, vacuum, or implicit solvent systems. Operating at this resolution allows for post-processing through force field energy evaluations and MD simulations, and enables the prediction of relevant properties in a gray-box manner (as ensemble averages of potential energy evaluations over generated samples). We demonstrate the utility of this paradigm on absolute hydration free energy (AHFE), producing estimates 4-10x faster and with comparable accuracy to standard GPU-based MD. By generating uncorrelated samples from alchemical Boltzmann distributions, we create more accurate, interpretable, and refinable ensemble predictions with calibrated uncertainty estimates, unlike regression methods which are entirely black-box predictors. Our approach also yields predictable benefits from increasing train- and test-time compute, realized by scaling model size and generating more samples, respectively. We believe that this approach demonstrates the utility of high-resolution ensemble generation for free energy estimation, with future potential to replace MD in tasks such as the prediction of lipophilicity, membrane permeability, or absolute binding free energy (ABFE) -- whose grounding and interpretability may be critical for the development of new drugs and materials.

papers.title_zh: AquaGen：将生成模型扩展到数千原子的分子动力学精度
papers.summary_cn: AquaGen是首个全原子、显式溶剂、周期边界条件感知的生成模型，能以分子动力学(MD)极小部分的成本从玻尔兹曼分布生成分子构型。该模型保留所有自由度，允许通过力场能量评估和MD模拟进行后处理，并以灰盒方式（对生成样本集做势能评估的系综平均）预测性质。在绝对水合自由能(AHFE)估计上，相比标准GPU-MD方法速度提升4-10倍且精度相当。增加模型规模或采样数量均可获得可预测的性能提升。
innovations: 首个支持全原子、显式溶剂、周期边界条件的生成模型，较以往粗粒化/真空/隐式溶剂方案保留了完整分子自由度
提出灰盒预测范式：通过对生成样本集进行势能评估的系综平均来预测性质，兼具可解释性、可优化性和校准的不确定性估计，不同于完全黑箱的回归方法
从炼金术玻尔兹曼分布生成非相关样本，无需大量相关MD轨迹即可实现精确的系综性质预测
训练时和测试时计算量增加（分别通过增大模型和增加采样数）均可带来可预测的性能收益，展现了良好的扩展性
papers.scenario_cn: 解决分子动力学模拟计算成本过高、采样效率低下的问题，适用于绝对水合自由能估计、亲脂性预测、膜渗透性预测、绝对结合自由能(ABFE)计算等药物研发和材料设计场景，尤其适合需要可解释性和不确定性量化的灰盒预测任务
papers.title_en: AquaGen: Scaling generative models to molecular dynamics precision on thousands of atoms

papers.title: CaSPECT: Discovering Causally Homogeneous Subgroups via Directed Spectral Clustering
papers.abstract: We propose \textbf{CaSPECT}, a causal spectral clustering framework for discovering causally homogeneous subgroups from observational data. Rather than clustering in covariate space, CaSPECT defines similarity through the topology of a learned directed acyclic graph (DAG); a bootstrap-stabilised PC algorithm recovers the causal skeleton; a novel \emph{Orientation Validation Score} (OVS) combines PC bootstrap evidence with DirectLiNGAM to orient edges robustly; directed edges are weighted by backdoor-identified average treatment effects estimated via OLS or double machine learning. Chung's directed Laplacian provides a spectral embedding in which individuals close together share the same causal propagation pathways. We establish almost-sure consistency of the full pipeline and validate the method through a controlled simulation study and on LaLonde CPS1, IHDP, and 401(k) datasets, where CaSPECT recovers a positive and statistically significant treatment effect within the causally comparable subpopulation and corrects for severe confounding without requiring a pre-specified propensity score model.
papers.content_snippet: We propose \textbf{CaSPECT}, a causal spectral clustering framework for discovering causally homogeneous subgroups from observational data. Rather than clustering in covariate space, CaSPECT defines similarity through the topology of a learned directed acyclic graph (DAG); a bootstrap-stabilised PC algorithm recovers the causal skeleton; a novel \emph{Orientation Validation Score} (OVS) combines PC bootstrap evidence with DirectLiNGAM to orient edges robustly; directed edges are weighted by backdoor-identified average treatment effects estimated via OLS or double machine learning. Chung's directed Laplacian provides a spectral embedding in which individuals close together share the same causal propagation pathways. We establish almost-sure consistency of the full pipeline and validate the method through a controlled simulation study and on LaLonde CPS1, IHDP, and 401(k) datasets, where CaSPECT recovers a positive and statistically significant treatment effect within the causally comparable subpopulation and corrects for severe confounding without requiring a pre-specified propensity score model.
papers.title_zh: CaSPECT：通过有向谱聚类发现因果同质子群
papers.summary_cn: CaSPECT是一种因果谱聚类框架，从观测数据中发现因果同质子群。与传统基于协变量空间的聚类不同，它通过学习有向无环图(DAG)的拓扑来定义样本相似性：Bootstrap稳定的PC算法恢复因果骨架，定向验证分数(OVS)结合PC Bootstrap证据与DirectLiNGAM稳健地确定边的方向，后门准则识别的平均处理效应(ATE)为有向边加权。Chung有向拉普拉斯矩阵提供谱嵌入，使相近的个体共享相同的因果传播路径。在LaLonde CPS1、IHDP和401(k)等经典因果推断基准上，无需预设倾向性得分模型即可从因果可比子群中恢复正向且统计显著的处理效应。
innovations: 提出基于因果拓扑而非协变量空间的聚类范式，确保同一子群内部个体共享相同的因果传播路径，从根本上改变了传统聚类的相似性定义
创新性地提出定向验证分数(OVS)，融合PC Bootstrap的证据强度与DirectLiNGAM的因果方向推断，实现鲁棒的边定向
建立了完整管线的几乎必然一致性(almost-sure consistency)理论保证，从因果发现到聚类收敛均有严格证明
无需预先指定倾向性得分模型即可在强混杂场景下校正偏差，在多个基准上恢复出正且显著的处理效应
papers.scenario_cn: 解决观测数据中因混杂偏差导致处理效应估计不准确的问题，适用于因果推断中因果可比子群的发现、处理效应异质性分析、政策/项目评估（如劳动培训计划、退休储蓄计划等）以及医学观察性研究中的亚组因果分析
papers.title_en: CaSPECT: Discovering Causally Homogeneous Subgroups via Directed Spectral Clustering

papers.title: Reflected Schrödinger Bridge Matching
papers.abstract: Recent advances in generative modeling have enabled the efficient computation of Schrödinger bridges (SB) in high-dimensional settings by leveraging partially simulation-free training methods inspired by flow matching. However, these have not covered SBs with reflecting dynamics, a useful model choice with built-in guarantees that generated samples stay in the data domain. Existing alternatives for reflected SBs instead rely on more complex training based on forward--backward SDE theory, requiring expensive higher-order derivatives and sampling entire paths during training. In this article, we introduce a partially simulation-free framework that allows reflected SBs to be trained similarly to flow matching, using a new sampling method and regression target. We demonstrate our results by coupling pairs of well-known high-dimensional image datasets. Using reflected dynamics incurs negligible additional wall-clock time during both training and inference while maintaining or slightly improving generative performance.

papers.title_zh: 反射薛定谔桥匹配
papers.institution: KTH皇家理工学院、查尔姆斯理工大学
papers.summary_cn: 本文提出反射薛定谔桥匹配（RSBM）框架，将迭代马尔可夫拟合（IMF）方法扩展到反射动力学场景。核心贡献是设计了一种部分免模拟的训练方法，使得反射薛定谔桥可以像流匹配一样高效训练，通过新的桥中点采样算法和回归目标避免传统方法中昂贵的前向-后向SDE模拟和高阶导数计算。在MNIST↔EMNIST和AFHQ图像数据集上的实验表明，反射动力学在训练和推理阶段几乎不增加额外计算时间，同时保持或略优于非反射方法的生成质量。
innovations: 将部分免模拟的流匹配式训练框架首次引入反射薛定谔桥问题，避免了传统方法中完整路径采样和高阶导数的巨大开销
提出了反射布朗桥中点的高效采样算法（Algorithm 2），通过镜像操作和加权采样实现闭式采样，无需迭代SDE模拟
利用Girsanov定理替代无穷小生成元方法处理反射过程Doob h-变换，规避了约束域中生成元域的表征难题，使理论证明更简洁
证明反射桥的KL散度回归目标与非反射情况保持相同形式，使反射SB训练可复用现有DSBM代码基础设施
papers.scenario_cn: 解决高维生成模型中样本越界问题：当数据天然有界（如图像像素[0,1]、物理状态空间约束、分子构象约束）时，反射动力学生成的样本自动保持在有效域内，避免非反射模型常见的越界伪影。适用于图像生成、受约束的分子设计、物理模拟中边界条件严格的生成任务。
papers.title_en: Reflected Schrödinger Bridge Matching

papers.title: Vidu S1: A Real-Time Interactive Video Generation Model
papers.abstract: We introduce Vidu S1, a real-time interactive video generation model supporting voice control of digital characters. Users can control video generation content at any moment through voice instructions. Vidu S1 supports infinite-length real-time video generation without blurring, drift, or visual distortion. Built with TurboDiffusion and TurboServe, Vidu S1 outputs 540p real-time videos at up to 42 FPS on regular consumer GPUs. Users can upload custom images of real people, anime, and pets, and choose different voice tones for personalized experiences. Experiments show that Vidu S1 achieves the best performance across all test metrics while fully meeting real-time inference requirements. A playable online demo is available at https://vidu.com/vidu-stream.

papers.title_zh: Vidu S1：实时交互式视频生成模型
papers.summary_cn: Vidu S1 是一款支持语音实时控制数字角色的交互式视频生成模型。用户可在任意时刻通过语音指令控制视频生成内容，支持无限长度的实时视频生成，且不出现模糊、漂移或视觉畸变。模型基于 TurboDiffusion 和 TurboServe 架构构建，在常规消费级 GPU 上即可输出 540p 分辨率、最高 42 FPS 的实时视频。支持上传真人、动漫和宠物等自定义图像，并可选不同语音风格以提供个性化体验。实验表明，Vidu S1 在所有测试指标上均取得最佳表现，同时完全满足实时推理需求。在线 Demo 可访问 vidu.com/vidu-stream。
innovations: 提出实时交互式视频生成范式，用户通过语音指令动态控制生成内容，支持无限长度生成且无累积畸变
设计 TurboDiffusion + TurboServe 协同架构，在消费级 GPU 上实现 540p@42FPS 的实时推理性能
支持多类别自定义形象（真人/动漫/宠物）与多语音风格切换的个性化交互体验
papers.scenario_cn: 数字人/虚拟主播实时互动、AI 角色扮演对话、直播辅助内容生成、个性化虚拟形象控制、实时影视预可视化、游戏 NPC 动态内容生成
